case_title: TIMOTHY GLASPER VS. JESSICA ANNE VERRILLI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLASPER, TIMOTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERRILLI, JESSICA ANNE $5,285.12 PRINCIPAL, $150.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,435.62, I AWARD 72 HOURS X 35.21 FOR REGULAR LOST WAGES, $2250 FOR LOSS OF OVERTIME HOURS, AND $500 FOR PAIN & SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED WITH CONTINUANCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.50) SERVED AUG-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VERRILLI, JESSICA ANNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY GLASPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JESSICA ANNE VERRILLI IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO DEC-21-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSICA ANNE VERRILLE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PROTEM AMANDA FISHCHER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JAN-02-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GLASPER, TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT VERRILLI, JESSICA ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VERRILLI, JESSICA ANNE HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT VERRILLI, JESSICA ANNE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-21-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
